word: G3421 - μνημονεύω - mnēmoneúō - mnay-mon-yoo'-o - Make mention; be mindful

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Make mention; be mindful
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to be mindful of, to remember, to call to mind
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a derivative of G3420; to exercise memory, that is, recollect; by implication to punish; also to rehearse: - make mention, be mindful, remember.
